name: Vegan Chocolate Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Sift together self-rising flour, cocoa powder, and baking powder in a large bowl.
3. Gradually add vanilla sugar or superfine sugar until well combined.
4. Stir in sunflower oil and water until the batter is smooth.
5. Grease a cake pan with vegan margarine.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and firm to the touch.
8. Turn off the oven and let it cool in the turned-off oven for 10 minutes before removing the cake from the pan.
